full_text:
Zhang Yan (Zijie) 張儼 (子節)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Yan (張儼), styledZijie (子節). A high-ranking Wu official, he was also an author. Zhang Yan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
